title: List Commands
description: Operasi pada tipe data List (linked list) di Redis — queue, stack, dan timeline.

commands.name: LPUSH / RPUSH
commands.title: Menambah Element ke List
commands.description: Menambahkan satu atau lebih element ke awal (L) atau akhir (R) list.
commands.syntax:
LPUSH key element [element ...]
RPUSH key element [element ...]

options.description: Push hanya jika key sudah ada
Push hanya jika key sudah ada

commands.examples:
RPUSH tasks "task1" "task2" "task3"
LPUSH notifications "new message"
LPUSHX mylist "value"  # hanya jika mylist ada
commands.notes: LPUSH + RPOP = Queue (FIFO). LPUSH + LPOP = Stack (LIFO).

commands.name: LPOP / RPOP / LRANGE
commands.title: Mengambil Element dari List
commands.description: Mengambil dan menghapus element, atau melihat range element.
commands.syntax:
LPOP key [count]
RPOP key [count]
LRANGE key start stop
commands.examples:
RPUSH queue "a" "b" "c" "d"
LPOP queue         # "a"
RPOP queue         # "d"
LPOP queue 2       # ["b", "c"]
LRANGE queue 0 -1  # semua element
LINDEX queue 0     # element pertama
LLEN queue
commands.notes: LRANGE 0 -1 menampilkan semua element tanpa menghapusnya.

commands.name: BLPOP / BRPOP
commands.title: Blocking Pop (Queue)
commands.description: Pop dengan blocking — menunggu sampai element tersedia atau timeout.
commands.syntax:
BLPOP key [key ...] timeout
BRPOP key [key ...] timeout
commands.examples:
# Consumer: tunggu task baru (timeout 30 detik)
BLPOP tasks 30

# Consumer: tunggu dari multiple queue
BLPOP high_priority low_priority 0

# Producer: tambah task
RPUSH tasks "process_email"
commands.notes: BLPOP sangat berguna untuk implementasi job queue yang efisien.

commands.name: LSET / LREM / LTRIM
commands.title: Modifikasi List
commands.syntax:
LSET key index value
LREM key count element
LTRIM key start stop
commands.examples:
RPUSH mylist "a" "b" "c" "b" "d"
LSET mylist 0 "A"       # ganti index 0
LREM mylist 0 "b"       # hapus semua "b"
LTRIM mylist 0 99       # simpan 100 teratas

# Pattern: Capped list (simpan 1000 terbaru)
LPUSH recent_logs "new log"
LTRIM recent_logs 0 999
commands.notes: LTRIM berguna untuk menjaga ukuran list tetap terbatas (capped collection).
